SysCron.name: ProvisioningTimeout
SysCron.description: Flip tenants stuck in provisioning INITIALIZING past softa.tenant.provisioning.ready-timeout-seconds (default 600s) to FAILED. Consumed by tenant-starter's TenantMaintenanceCronConsumer (CrossTenant; idempotent + self-healing).

SysCron.name: SubscriptionExpiry
SysCron.description: Hourly tick. Flips a tenant subscription to EXPIRED once effectiveTo passes in the owning tenant's timezone (local midnight), degrading it to Free. Consumed by tenant-starter's TenantMaintenanceCronConsumer (SubscriptionExpiryJob).
